task.inventory_reason: The cluster contains local code/data files from a PSA006 trolley multi-lab package. It appears to be a reusable project package, but the compact evidence is mostly analysis/helper code, so the package needs inventory before any result-table extraction or corpus promotion.
task.next_action: Inventory PSA006 trolley files under lead_harvest:psa_006_trolley; inspect aggregate_inferences, additional-table, plotting scripts, and data outputs for original/replication effect rows and sample sizes before routing specific tables to extraction.
